you guys will know I’ve made it when I buy my Thom Browne suit
life gets more difficult when your daily prerogatives need to expand beyond "read news, make news, read news, make news" on repeat til oblivion

for years the only structure in my life was servicing an unending news cycle, but as I move on from daily news work to longer projects, I need to create my own structure and it is difficult (both to imagine what it should be, and implement and execute it)
